name: Voucher / Reward
description: Reward screen with a unique code. QR code rendered via api.qrserver.com out of the box; swap for a self-hosted lib in production.
notes: Voucher code comes from GameContext.voucherCode — set it in the end-session action response.
QR rendering uses api.qrserver.com by default. Swap the in Voucher.tsx for a self-hosted generator (e.g. `qrcode` package) for production resilience.
Toggle via CAPE: settings.pages.voucher.showQr (boolean) and settings.pages.voucher.codeLength (number).
